title: Recolourful Containers Hardcore Hearts
description: Changes the hearts in Recolourful Containers to their hardcore variant!
body:
## Hardcore Hearts for Recolouful Containers GUI + HUD

This pack simply replaces the standard hearts on the HUD for [Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui) with their hardcore variants, without needing to play in hardcore mode!

All assets were created by [Vi_Tul](https://modrinth.com/user/Vi_Tul).
This pack will ONLY change the hearts texture. If you want the other textures, be sure to download Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD!

This Resource Pack was uploaded with permission from the original author and can/will be taken down at their request.
